default.name: Chemical synthesis
default.description: Reactions, purifications, and structural characterisation of small molecules.

default.name: Colloidal synthesis
default.description: Nanoparticle / nanocrystal synthesis, ligand exchange, and dispersion stability.

default.name: Mechanical setup building
default.description: Building or modifying experimental rigs, jigs, or instrument hardware.

default.name: Cell biology / culture
default.description: Cell-line work, transfection, cytotoxicity, microscopy of live or fixed cells.

default.name: Electrochemistry
default.description: Cyclic voltammetry, EIS, electrolytic / fuel-cell work, bioelectrochemistry.

default.name: Analytical / characterisation
default.description: HPLC, MS, NMR, XRD, microscopy, and other characterisation workflows.

default.name: Other
default.description: Use this for anything that doesn't fit the above process buckets.
